'''鈭歴h-m-f-s''' ('''kashamfesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rich|rich]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-m-f-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rich|rich]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-m-f-s
|-
! Lemma
| kashamfesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishamfesoko|thishamfesoko]] || [[word:jishamfesoko|jishamfesoko]] || [[word:shishamfesoko|shishamfesoko]] || [[word:kishamfesoko|kishamfesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushamfesoko|thuthushamfesoko]] || [[word:jujushamfesoko|jujushamfesoko]] || [[word:shushushamfesoko|shushushamfesoko]] || [[word:kukushamfesoko|kukushamfesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushamfesoko|thushamfesoko]] || [[word:jushamfesoko|jushamfesoko]] || [[word:shushamfesoko|shushamfesoko]] || [[word:kushamfesoko|kushamfesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushamfesoko|thushamfesoko]] || [[word:jushamfesoko|jushamfesoko]] || [[word:shushamfesoko|shushamfesoko]] || [[word:kushamfesoko|kushamfesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshamfesoko|theshamfesoko]] || [[word:jeshamfesoko|jeshamfesoko]] || [[word:sheshamfesoko|sheshamfesoko]] || [[word:keshamfesoko|keshamfesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshamfesoko|thothoshamfesoko]] || [[word:jojoshamfesoko|jojoshamfesoko]] || [[word:shoshoshamfesoko|shoshoshamfesoko]] || [[word:kokoshamfesoko|kokoshamfesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshamfesoko|thoshamfesoko]] || [[word:joshamfesoko|joshamfesoko]] || [[word:shoshamfesoko|shoshamfesoko]] || [[word:koshamfesoko|koshamfesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshamfesoko|thoshamfesoko]] || [[word:joshamfesoko|joshamfesoko]] || [[word:shoshamfesoko|shoshamfesoko]] || [[word:koshamfesoko|koshamfesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙shamfesoko|th忙shamfesoko]] || [[word:j忙shamfesoko|j忙shamfesoko]] || [[word:sh忙shamfesoko|sh忙shamfesoko]] || [[word:k忙shamfesoko|k忙shamfesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashamfesoko|thathashamfesoko]] || [[word:jajashamfesoko|jajashamfesoko]] || [[word:shashashamfesoko|shashashamfesoko]] || [[word:kakashamfesoko|kakashamfesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashamfesoko|thashamfesoko]] || [[word:jashamfesoko|jashamfesoko]] || [[word:shashamfesoko|shashamfesoko]] || [[word:kashamfesoko|kashamfesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashamfesoko|thashamfesoko]] || [[word:jashamfesoko|jashamfesoko]] || [[word:shashamfesoko|shashamfesoko]] || [[word:kashamfesoko|kashamfesoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
